name: Arknights RPG | Rhodes Island
description:
Arknights: Shadows of Terra

In "Arknights: Shadows of Terra," you play as an operative recruited by Rhodes Island to tackle various challenges across the continent of Terra. You’ll need to navigate complex situations, battle formidable enemies, and collaborate with other operatives to advance Rhodes Island’s mission of fighting the Oripathy crisis and uncovering the truth behind the continent’s mysteries.

Character Creation:

Pick Race, Class, Infection Level, and Skills to determine your starting stats and abilities!

  • Sniper: Master of long-range attacks, ideal for eliminating distant threats.

  • Guard: Skilled in close combat with high defense and damage output.

  • Medic: Healer with the ability to restore health and provide support.

  • Caster: Uses magic or technology to deal area-of-effect damage or control the battlefield.

  • Defender: Provides protection and can block multiple enemies.

  • Vanguard: Quick to deploy and excellent for resource management.

  • Specialist: Possesses unique abilities, such as summoning or crowd control

Gameplay Mechanics:

  • Mission-Based Structure:

    • Players undertake missions for Rhodes Island, each with specific objectives, such as rescuing survivors, securing resources, or investigating threats. Missions can range from combat scenarios to strategic planning.

  • Skill and Ability System:

    • Each class and race provides unique skills and abilities. For example, a Medic might have healing spells or boosts, while a Sniper can have long-range precision attacks or debuffs.

    • Abilities are chosen based on class and race, allowing for customization and strategic planning.

  • Interaction and Choices:

    • Players interact with Rhodes Island operatives and other characters through text-based dialogues. Choices made during interactions affect relationships, mission outcomes, and the overall story.

    • Moral decisions and strategic choices impact the narrative and the player's standing within Rhodes Island.

  • Combat System:

    • Combat is resolved through text-based descriptions and choices. Players use their skills and abilities to overcome enemies in turn-based or real-time scenarios.

    • Tactical decisions, such as positioning and timing, play a crucial role in battles.

  • Resource Management:

    • Players manage resources like deployment points, medical supplies, and equipment. Effective resource management is key to completing missions and maintaining Rhodes Island’s operations.

  • Story Progression:

    • The game features a dynamic story that evolves based on player actions and decisions. Uncover the mysteries of Terra, confront powerful foes, and explore the lore behind Rhodes Island and its mission.
creator: Fangblade
